# MTDT (McWhorter-Thomasson Digital Technologies)

> We are a software engineering and web development agency based in Lynchburg, Virginia. 
> We engineer high-velocity React ecosystems, Next.js web applications, and immutable backend pipelines for modern innovators.

## Services
- High-Performance React Websites (Next.js)
- Custom Web Applications (RSC, Advanced Auth, DB Scaling)
- SaaS Product Development
- Headless Digital Storefronts
- Backend Engineering (Automated Workflows, SOC2 Compliant Architectures)

## Contact
- Founders: Matthew McWhorter, Graham Thomasson
- Location: Lynchburg, VA (Serving clients locally and nationwide)
- Email: matt@mtdigitaltech.com
- Website: https://mtdigitaltech.com

For detailed service information, technical documentation, and pricing, refer to the full document: [llms-full.txt](https://mtdigitaltech.com/llms-full.txt)
